title: Scythes Of Death
description: ☠️ Scythes added to the game, faster for melee combat.
body:
**Scythes** added to the game, **faster** for **combat** against **monsters** and melee **players**. 😎

> *• Contains a **variant** for each existing **material** (wood, stone, iron, gold, and others).* 🛠️                                                
*• The reload **speed** of **scythes** is **2x faster** than the reload **speed** of **vanilla swords**.* 📌                                                                                                                                                                                                       

**W-A-R-N-I-N-G**: recommended to **use** the **[BetterCombat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)** mod to have a **better experience**. If you are going to use it on any modpack or server, remember to leave the credits linking to this page somewhere. 👀

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Ez8PdSd5Ork" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
